channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Quarterfinal brackets, match schedule and game previews
item.description: Talking points as France, Morocco, Spain, Belgium, Norway, England, Argentina and Switzerland aim for World Cup glory.

item.title: Zelenskyy seeks NATO support as Russia continues attacks
item.description: At the NATO summit, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had urged European allies to build missiles.

item.title: Why have 100,000 people been signed off work with ADHD in the UK?
item.description: New government statistics find four million people claimed disability benefits in April.

item.title: Trump on Iran: ‘We’ll probably hit them hard again tonight’
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US will ‘probably’ carry out another round of strikes on Iran on Wednesday night.

item.title: ‘Down with the USA’: US influencer Jackson Hinkle attends Khamenei’s funera
item.description: ‘Down with the USA’: US influencer Jackson Hinkle attends Khamenei’s funeral

item.title: Why has UK Reform’s Nigel Farage resigned as MP? What happens next?
item.description: Farage faces intense scrutiny over undeclared donations before 2024 elections as he says he'll run in by-election.

item.title: Timeline: 20 years of Hamas rule in Gaza, from election to political exit
item.description: A chronological look at key milestones from Hamas's 2006 election victory to its 2026 exit from governing Gaza.

item.title: Why can’t we count our dead?
item.description: Most of the world's dead never make the official record. The death toll is an educated guess, not an actual count.

item.title: UN inquiry urges release of Palestinian doctor jailed by Israel
item.description: The inquiry commission urges Israel to release Hussam Abu Safia, citing credible reports he has suffered 'severe abuse'.

item.title: Iran’s supreme leader’s coffin arrives in Najaf
item.description: Thousands of mourners thronged Najaf as the coffin of the late supreme leader moved through the city.

item.title: Syria in tough balancing act as it tightens security after Damascus blasts
item.description: Authorities increase security measures after back-to-back deadly explosions rattle residents.

item.title: Iran signals defiance as Trump fumes over Strait of Hormuz strikes
item.description: Iranian officials insist that Tehran will not give up control over the waterway as US attacks threaten fragile truce.

item.title: Trump threatens Spain trade, demands US take over Greenland at NATO summit
item.description: The US president described Spain as a 'terrible partner' over its actions during the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Biggest takeaways from the round of 16
item.description: The last-16 phase is now behind us with plenty of key takeaways as the tournament enters the quarterfinals.

item.title: Trump says MoU ‘over’ after latest US and Iranian attacks
item.description: President Donald Trump has said the Memorandum of Understanding with Iran is ‘over’, after the latest strikes.

item.title: Gaza aid worker killed minutes before World Cup screening he organised
item.description: Mohammed al-Wahidi was killed in an Israeli strike just before people gathered for a World Cup screening he organised.

item.title: ‘There are risks’: Ex-India judge behind damning UN report on Gaza children
item.description: Before he exposed Israel's deliberate targeting of Gaza children, Srinivasan Muralidhar took on Indian authorities.

item.title: Syria says one killed, 36 wounded after Damascus blasts during Macron visit
item.description: Macron, who continued his visit after the blasts, said Syria must not be 'destabilised' by the attacks.

item.title: World Cup Golden Boot: Messi leads Mbappe, Haaland before quarterfinals
item.description: Messi is the top goal scorer after tallying his eighth against Egypt, with Erling Haaland and Kylian Mbappe next best.

item.title: Switzerland fans’ joy as team reaches World Cup quarter-final
item.description: Switzerland fans’ joy as team reaches World Cup quarter-final

item.title: Trump says ceasefire ‘over’, reups threats after US and Iran trade attacks
item.description: Speaking at NATO summit, Trump says US may resume naval blockade, launch more strikes, and 'take over' Kharg island.

item.title: Nigeria’s counterterrorism gains carry a warning
item.description: Mass surrenders may weaken armed groups, but reintegration without justice risks fuelling resentment.

item.title: Why have US-Iran strikes resumed and what does it mean for peace?
item.description: Both sides have accused each other of violating the memorandum of understanding signed in June.

item.title: Pakistan searches for Boeing cargo plane missing over Arabian Sea
item.description: Karachi-bound aircraft lost contact with air traffic control after reporting navigation ⁠system fault.

item.title: European MPs call for probe of FIFA boss Infantino over red card suspension
item.description: Lawmakers call FIFA decision to scrap Balogun suspension after Trump intervention 'a disgrace'.
